positive: A stylized, minimalist woodland creature illustration, centered composition. Depict a wise fox sitting amongst stylized autumn foliage and meandering river stones. The style is clean linework mixed with bold, flat color blocks, evoking a contemporary Nordic folk art feel. Use a limited, earthy palette of burnt orange, deep teal, terracotta red, and forest green. The image must have a strong, clear silhouette suitable for screen printing onto fabric. The background should be simple and segmented to allow for isolated subject matter. High contrast and clean edges are crucial. Perfect for apparel printing, vector-art quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, messy, photorealism, complex background, gradient
